title: Search open orders for warehouse staff
trigger: Staff member queries the order list with optional filters
success_outcome: A paginated list of open orders matching the filters is returned
tldr: Return paginated open orders filtered by status and warehouse

in: Filter by status and warehouse id
Return paginated results sorted by created-at descending

behavior: GET /orders?status=&warehouseId=&page=&size= returns a page of orders in OPEN or PAID status visible to the requesting warehouse. Default page size is 20; max is 100.
business_rules:
- WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND: reject unrecognised warehouse ids with 404.
- INVALID_PAGE_SIZE: page size must be between 1 and 100; reject out-of-range values with 400.
- Staff may only query warehouses assigned to them; return WAREHOUSE_ACCESS_DENIED (403) otherwise.
acceptance_scenarios: Given a warehouse id the staff member is assigned to, when they query open orders, then a paginated list is returned
Given an unrecognised warehouse id, when queried, then 404 WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND is returned
Given a page size of 0, when queried, then 400 INVALID_PAGE_SIZE is returned
inputs_outputs_errors: Input: status (enum), warehouseId (UUID), page (int), size (int 1-100). Output: {items: Order[], total: int, page: int}. Errors: 404 WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND, 400 INVALID_PAGE_SIZE, 403 WAREHOUSE_ACCESS_DENIED.
definition_of_done: All acceptance scenarios have passing tests
Pagination defaults and limits are enforced
